_meta.description: Validated OSM (Overpass) GPS polylines for the curated AllTrails trails, keyed by stringified AllTrails id. Populated by scripts/fetch_alltrails_geometry.py in an environment with outbound network access (the dev sandbox blocks egress). Merged into featured trails by trails_quality.alltrails_to_trail so they render as lines on the map without a runtime backfill.
_meta.validation: trails_quality.validate_trail_geometry (in PT bounds, >=8 points, no >2km gaps, length within 0.5x-2.0x of AllTrails distance)
